calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Petitioner: Jennifer Bonilla, present in pro per and as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Joel Bonilla.
Rolando Bonilla, the Minor's father present in pro per and objected to the proposed change of name of the Minor.
No bojections to the proposed change of name were made for Jennifer Elizabeth Bonilla.
Parties were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and opposition, the Name Change request for Minor: Joel Anthony Bonilla is Denied without prejudice.
The Name Change request for Petitioner: Jennifer Elizabeth Boinilla is off calendar at Petitioner's request.
